title: Handsel
overview: A young thief, who is working for a local gang, enters a house with a wealthy family, in the way he thinks. Although he is a burglar with experience, one of the family members notices him. When the thief realizes that he is noticed, he tries to finish his job by making a choice. When things go wrong, he makes an irreversible mistake because of his complexes. Fate will decide if the thief who left a mystery behind gets punished or not. But the thief himself must decide which is more educatory; personal preferences or the destiny.
